geometric_interpretation.branch_set: Two branch records are emitted from the same pre-collapse LGRC9V3 runtime state. They are distinct by edge, source node, coherence, conductance, and support-gradient score.
geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: This is a provisional LC3 candidate pending I5 replay and I7 controls. It is not semantic choice, intention, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant-ecology implementation.
geometric_interpretation.collapse: The selected branch has the higher support-gradient score by the declared margin, so the producer schedules one packet along that branch and records the resulting departure, arrival, and local-update events.
geometric_interpretation.counterfactual_retention: The non-selected branch remains as an immutable pre-collapse audit record. It need not remain dynamically active after collapse.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I4 records two pre-collapse LGRC branch geometries, then a support-gradient-dominant continuation through one selected branch.

purpose: produce the first source-current live branch set and collapse candidate
